title: Junior Investment Banker at CCAvenue Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at CCAvenue Global Group
jsonLd.description:
CCAvenue Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CCAvenue Global Group:
CCAvenue Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue Global Group!
